reviews.comment:
Buena y rápida atención. Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Good and fast service. Clean bathrooms.

reviews.comment:
MALISIMO! En el servicompras no aceptan tarjeta de crédito y no nos avisaron hasta después de consumir y comprar, alegando ser una orden de la gerencia de Automóvil Club Argentino.

(Translated by Google)
AWFUL! Servicompras doesn't accept credit cards, and they didn't notify us until after we'd purchased something, claiming it was an order from the management of the Argentine Automobile Club.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNdG9YWi1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención en el servicompras pesima. 20 min antes de que cierren me echaron del lugar. Una de las empleadastrato despectivamente a mi esposa y a mi hijo. Lamentable. Hice la queja en el libro. Todavia espero que alguien se comunique conmigo. Realmente con quien hablo dejo en claro el pesimo trato del lugar.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the convenience store was terrible. They kicked me out 20 minutes before closing time. One of the employees treated my wife and son with disrespect. It was awful. I filed a complaint in the logbook. I'm still waiting for someone to contact me. The person I spoke to made it clear how terrible the service was.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNNnVPaDFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No me quisieron cargar combustible ppr que estaba cansado el gordo

(Translated by Google)
They didn't want to fill me up with fuel because the fat guy was tired.

reviews.comment:
Otra YPF en una ruta principal que une San Juan con Mendoza.Lo mejor, el bar de al lado que vende exquisitos sanwiches de jamon con pan casero.

(Translated by Google)
Another YPF station on a main road connecting San Juan and Mendoza. The best part is the bar next door that sells delicious ham sandwiches on homemade bread.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNay1hOTJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
